title: festuca cyllenica subsp. cyllenica
intro: Festuca cyllenica subsp. cyllenica, also known as Cretan fescue, is a subspecies of the Festuca genus, a type of grass native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been found to have antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Festuca cyllenica subsp. cyllenica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may also be used in the form of essential oils or dried extracts in various herbal preparations.
